case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICPAL VS. RAMON HONORATO LARIOS ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 58335365)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LARIOS, RAMON HONORATO RYDER TRUCK RENTAL LT DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-07-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-10-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-14-2015
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-07-2015 CONTINUED TO DEC-09-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-02-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-02-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-09-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
